data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of syncing back to the main booking system. However, there is no evidence in the prior steps that confirms this requirement is met. The linked use case explicitly states the need for this sync, but the absence of any concrete evidence or successful validation of this functionality indicates a clear gap in the implementation.
gaps: No evidence of syncing back to the main booking system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the sync back to the main booking system.
